title: Chapter 126
content:
Chapter 126

“Does it feel good, young lady?” I asked while fucking her face. Her eyes locked on mine, and the confusion in them made the scene even hotter.

“Hnn~~!”

I didn’t know that was a moan or a yes, but I didn’t care. The advantage of this world was that I could interpret whatever I wanted, how I wanted.

“Slurp~”

“Glok!”

“Gulg! Gulg!”

Martha was doing her job very well, allowing me to do mine perfectly since Cassandra was too far gone into pleasure to even properly control her mouth.

She did keep eye contact intact, though, and seeing her deep in her eyes while I used her mouth to satisfy my lust soon threw me to the edge.

After a few more thrusts, I grunted and pushed deep into her mouth, going halfway inside her throat and releasing everything. I could feel her resistance as I kept her head fixed on my cock without letting her back away.

Psshh!!!

It wasn’t long before I heard another sound, which I recognized very well.

She was cumming too.

She was gagging and trying to free herself from above while pushing her pussy in Martha’s face from below.

Finally, I stopped cumming, and once my dick shrank down on its own, she was free from above.

She gasped out loud and also coughed vehemently, even coughing up some of my semen, but most of it had gone down her throat properly.

“Sluck!”

“Slurp~”

“Suck~~”

Yet Martha hadn’t stopped.

Even though Cassandra had erupted in her face once, she was still going, not allowing Cassandra to come to terms with what had happened to her.

As much as I wanted to go again, it had been thirty minutes since we began. I knew full well that if I continued to fucking her, we’d be here all day. I didn’t want that. And I certainly didn’t want Lucas waking up, so I just flopped down on my ass and watched the show before me.

Watched how Cassandra squirmed with her face on the ground and her ass in the air as Martha ate her out. How her face glistened with her spit and the remnants of my cum, how her eyes were glassy from the slightly rough experience earlier, and tear stains marred her face, which I doubted were because of sadness.

Her hips buckled and moved on their own as Martha continued to expertly eat her wet snatch. The wet sounds were traveling far enough to even enter my ears. Enough that I could imagine what was going on down there.

And it didn’t take long for Cassandra to cum again. And then again. And again. After the fifth time, when she couldn’t even move, and her knees were red, and her eyes were slightly hollow, only then did Martha stop and stand up from behind her.

Only then did I notice that Martha’s pants were gone and her crotch was wet. She was touching herself.

She looked at the passed-out young noblewoman and nodded with pride, and made her way to me, turning her bubbly ass to me and said, “I did a good job, right, brother? So please massage me too, please.”

“Haha. Sure.” I replied and buried my head in her pussy, inhaling the strawberry scent with my nose and licking the juice right off her tight, wet hole.

~~

“How do you feel, young lady?” I asked Cassandra once she woke up. Martha was lying next to me, also breathless, but still in better shape than Cassandra was.

Cassandra looked at the breathless Martha, then at me, and then remained silent as if she was coming up with the correct reply, “I don’t think I like this.”

Figured. First time and so rough already. Anyone would have a hard time. Not to mention, she was a noble lady, so her experience was rather… humiliating.

“I see. Do you feel no advantages to it?” I asked, trying to be understanding.

“No. I feel fully recovered. But the act itself is a little… extreme.” She couldn’t find the right word for it, but in the end, that was what she came up with.

“It feels like that in the beginning, young lady. But once you get used to it, it is a great means to feel pleasure and fully recover.” I explained with a soft tone, making sure I didn’t sound pushy.

“Does your older sister like this too?” Cassandra asked, with a slight hesitation in her voice.

Wait a minute. Was that what I think it was?

“Yes. She loves it, actually.” I replied with a smile.

“She was the one who came up with this idea.” I made sure to add before she could register the earlier statement.

“Is that so? This is her discovery.” Cassandra mumbled, to which I immediately nodded in reply, “Yes. And she loves it very much. She even tried to commercialize the idea, but we decided against it due to my abnormality.”

The logical explanation mixed with the personal one she wanted to hear. Cassandra nodded and touched her stomach with her hand before she took a deep breath and said, “It is a little difficult for me, but I… will think about trying it again.”

Haha. So that’s what it was, huh? She wasn’t just into the brother. She was slightly into the sister too. Maybe more than the brother, but denying it from the surface.

I didn’t say anything about it, though. Just smiled, as if I knew nothing better, and steered the conversation to our current predicament, locking away this key information in my mind for later.

“I think we have rested long enough. We should move now.” I suggested, and Cassandra nodded, snapping out of her thoughts.

It had been about an hour and a half since we stopped for rest. The original plan was to stop for two hours, one hour each for the physical fighters, but Cassandra was as good as new thanks to my magic semen, and Lucas had rested long enough to not complain.

Still…

[Energize]

I cast the spell on both Cassandra and Martha. This spell was a lower version of a stamina potion. But it also provided an effect of constantly restoring stamina for ten minutes, even though the speed was very slow compared to the potion of the same effect.

Lucas was woken up. He didn’t complain about steering away from the plan since he had rested long enough. He did ask Cassandra, though, since he was under the impression she didn’t rest at all.

He was placated soon enough, and we turned our eyes towards the door.

“Let’s go,” I said, going to the front and placing my hands on the door. Martha stood behind me, and Cassandra and Lucas flanked me on the sides. This formation was chosen so I could cast a shield spell in case someone ambushed us from the inside, or a spell or an arrow from some mechanism fell on us.

This formation protected everyone and was great for going into the unknown and unpredictable areas.

Fortunately, there was nothing like that. The door opened, and unlike the clichéd darkness in the room, which would deem one incapable of seeing even one step ahead, the room was decently bright with mana luminescent stones we came across in the whole dungeon.

It was a circular room made of some special kind of stone, and in one corner of the room, there were stairs that led to a simple throne, and on the throne sat the overlord of this dungeon, hopefully.

The reason why I said that was because the creature on the throne wasn’t a golem. It was something else.

Given that we had encountered golems so far, the boss of this room should have been a golem. If it wasn’t, then it meant two things. Either it was just a coincidence and clearing this room would end this dungeon, or this one was the normal creature of the next stage, which was a problem on its own.

This dungeon was already unpredictable. The last thing I wanted was for it to be a stage dungeon.

Who knew how many levels there would be? Would it end with this one, the next one, or would there be many, many more as we advance?

Just the thought was giving me the chills.

Thankfully, my train of thought came to a swift halt when the creature on the throne stood up and began to descend the stairs.

I could see clearly what it was, and now that it was even closer, I couldn’t help but sigh at the level of difficulty of this boss. I would have preferred a higher level of golem, like a bronze or a steel golem, before this one.

Why…?

[Species: Mimic]

[Difficulty: Depends on Mimicry]

[Description: A race that can mimic your moves and experience

Conditions apply]

[Status: Guardian of the first floor]

[Chosen target: The user]

[Difficulty will be limited as the user cannot be fully comprehended]

[Difficulty: B]

Great. All the bad news at once.

~~

Let me know if there are any mistakes.
